title: Arbitrage Signal Event
description: An append-only signal event recorded by the cross-vendor arbitrage instrument. Recorded via audit_log (operation = 'arbitrage.signal.<family>') and mirrored as an OTel measurement.

family.description: Which of the five signal families this event belongs to.

vendor.description: Vendor key, e.g. claude_code, codex, gemini, opencode.

work_unit_id.description: Identifier of the routed unit of work (e.g. work-package or task id).

payload.description: Family-specific fields. Examples: compliance -> {url, old_hash, new_hash} or {http_status:429, cumulative_usage}; quality_drift -> {old_fingerprint, new_fingerprint}.
